column1: Considering bonds issued by Toyota with mid-term maturity that feature call protection involving a make-whole premium, bonds from TotalEnergies maturing very soon that include provisions for change-of-control put and deleveraging, Apple bonds with a step-up structure also protected by a make-whole call schedule, and Siemens bonds with very long maturity carrying a straightforward unsecured covenant setup, what is the combined average yield adjusted for coupon differences across these four bond types?,"SELECT AVG(CouponAdjustedYield) AS CouponAdjustedYield FROM (SELECT CouponAdjustedYield AS CouponAdjustedYield FROM IssuerCreditYieldRegistry WHERE IssuerLEI = ""Toyota Motor Corporation"" AND MaturityTenorBucket = ""5-7 year semicore"" AND CovenantShadowDescription = ""call protection with make-whole premium schedule"" UNION ALL SELECT CouponAdjustedYield AS CouponAdjustedYield FROM IssuerCreditYieldRegistry WHERE IssuerLEI = ""TotalEnergies SE"" AND MaturityTenorBucket = ""ultra short 0-6 months"" AND CovenantShadowDescription = ""change-of-control put and deleveraging trigger"" UNION ALL SELECT CouponAdjustedYield AS CouponAdjustedYield FROM IssuerCreditYieldRegistry WHERE IssuerLEI = ""Apple Inc."" AND MaturityTenorBucket = ""step-up structured tenor"" AND CovenantShadowDescription = ""call protection with make-whole premium schedule"" UNION ALL SELECT CouponAdjustedYield AS CouponAdjustedYield FROM IssuerCreditYieldRegistry WHERE IssuerLEI = ""Siemens AG"" AND MaturityTenorBucket = ""20-30 year ultra long"" AND CovenantShadowDescription = ""clean unsecured plain vanilla covenant package"")

What is the average CurveCalibratedNPV (net present value), in USD, of the following three records: the "Société Générale covered bond series 5" with credit bucket "high yield industrial", liquidity tenor "1-year certificate of deposit ladder", and regulatory imperative "Liquidity Coverage Ratio monitoring"; the "US Treasury 10-year reference" with credit bucket "supranational AAA tranche", liquidity tenor "5-year callable profile", and regulatory imperative "CCAR supervisory scenario"; and the "US Treasury 10-year reference" with credit bucket "project finance limited recourse", liquidity tenor "1-month commercial paper", and regulatory imperative "MiFID II best execution audit"?,"SELECT AVG(CurveCalibratedNPV) AS CurveCalibratedNPV FROM (SELECT CurveCalibratedNPV AS CurveCalibratedNPV FROM SecuritizedValuationLedger WHERE InstrumentUID = ""Société Générale covered bond series 5"" AND CreditBucket = ""high yield industrial"" AND LiquidityTenor = ""1-year certificate of deposit ladder"" AND RegulatoryImperative = ""Liquidity Coverage Ratio monitoring"" UNION ALL SELECT CurveCalibratedNPV AS CurveCalibratedNPV FROM SecuritizedValuationLedger WHERE InstrumentUID = ""US Treasury 10-year reference"" AND CreditBucket = ""supranational AAA tranche"" AND LiquidityTenor = ""5-year callable profile"" AND RegulatoryImperative = ""CCAR supervisory scenario"" UNION ALL SELECT CurveCalibratedNPV AS CurveCalibratedNPV FROM SecuritizedValuationLedger WHERE InstrumentUID = ""US Treasury 10-year reference"" AND CreditBucket = ""project finance limited recourse"" AND LiquidityTenor = ""1-month commercial paper"" AND RegulatoryImperative = ""MiFID II best execution audit"")

What is the combined average earnings yield for credit structures classified under the residual category of structured credit, considering both the 2017 fintech-originated tranche funded overnight and the 2022 transition-labelled tranche with a medium-dated bullet schedule, under respectively illiquid end-of-day and seasonally volatile market conditions?,"SELECT AVG(ModelledEarningsYield) AS ModelledEarningsYield FROM (SELECT ModelledEarningsYield AS ModelledEarningsYield FROM SecuritisationAnalyticsLedger WHERE SecuritisationVintage = ""vintage2017 fintech-originated sleeve"" AND FundingTenorBucket = ""overnight bilateral funding"" AND LoanLossProvisionSegment = ""structured credit residual"" AND MarketLiquidityStencil = ""end-of-day illiquid windows"" UNION ALL SELECT ModelledEarningsYield AS ModelledEarningsYield FROM SecuritisationAnalyticsLedger WHERE SecuritisationVintage = ""vintage2022 transition-labelled issuance"" AND FundingTenorBucket = ""medium-dated bullet tranche"" AND LoanLossProvisionSegment = ""structured credit residual"" AND MarketLiquidityStencil = ""seasonal volatility-prone"")
